query:
INSERT INTO debounce_key (job_id, key)
            VALUES ($1, $2)
            ON CONFLICT (key)
            DO UPDATE SET
                previous_job_id = CASE WHEN EXISTS
                    (SELECT 1 FROM v2_job_queue q WHERE q.id = debounce_key.job_id AND q.running)
                    THEN NULL ELSE debounce_key.job_id END,
                job_id = EXCLUDED.job_id,
                debounced_times = CASE WHEN EXISTS
                    (SELECT 1 FROM v2_job_queue q WHERE q.id = debounce_key.job_id AND q.running)
                    THEN 0 ELSE debounce_key.debounced_times + 1 END,
                first_started_at = CASE WHEN EXISTS
                    (SELECT 1 FROM v2_job_queue q WHERE q.id = debounce_key.job_id AND q.running)
                    THEN now() ELSE debounce_key.first_started_at END
            RETURNING debounced_times, first_started_at, previous_job_id AS job_id_to_debounce
